case_title: DOMINICI LUIGI VS LEAVITT JONATHAN DBA GREAT AMERICAN WATER PROOFING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY DOMINICI LUIGI AS TO DEFENDANT LEAVITT JONATHAN DBA GREAT AMERICAN WATER PROOFING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEAVITT JONATHAN DBA GREAT AMERICAN WATER PROOFING
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LEAVITT JONATHAN DBA GREAT AMERICAN WATER PROOFING AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DOMINICI LUIGI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF DOMINICI LUIGI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOMINICI LUIGI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEAVITT JONATHAN DBA GREAT AMERICAN WATER PROOFING $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,077.00, THIS CLAIM IS NOT PART OF PRIOR ACTION #744453 W/C WAS FOR FRONT DECK, FAILURE TO COMPLETE WORK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DOMINICI LUIGI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
